title: Development of a descriptive language for groundnut (Arachis hypogaea)
abstract: Descriptor classification and descriptor definitions A listing of the groundnut descriptors currently in use would be a redundant and unwieldy document, with a great number of functionally equivalent descriptors, differing in name or method of measurement. For a groundnut data base to meet the requirement of ease of reference, some technique for recognizing functional equivalence and redundancy is needed. IS/GR has found it necessary to classify other crops (i.e. wheat, maize) descriptors in a convenient way. This descriptor classification scheme is presented below...
